  * The paper does not provide explicit details on how the model architecture was selected. However, it mentions the use of machine learning algorithms to reveal unique gene expression profiles in muscle biopsies from patients with different types of myositis. This suggests that the architecture might have been chosen based on its ability to handle and interpret complex biological data, but the specific selection method is not disclosed.
